name: Brown Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornmeal and flours in a large bowl with the baking soda, salt, and raisins.
2. Beat together liquids in a separate bowl.
3. Vigorously blend the liquids into dry ingredients using a wooden spoon.
4. Pour the mixture into two well-greased or buttered one-pound coffee cans.
5. Butter two 6-inch squares of foil and tie around the tops of the coffee cans with string.
6. Place on a rack in a closely covered pot.
7. Pour 2 inches of water into the pot, ensuring a tight seal for steam.
8. Weight down the cover to maintain the seal.
9. Do not open the pot until at least two hours have passed.
10. Let cool for 20 minutes before unmolding.
